steps.title: Your WooCommerce Menu
steps.body: Everything for your online store lives here. Click this any time to get back to your orders, products, and settings.

steps.title: Orders
steps.body: This is where new customer orders appear. When someone buys something from your site, it shows up here first.

steps.title: Your Order List
steps.body: Each row is one customer order. You can see the order number, who placed it, the total, and its current status at a glance.

steps.title: Order Status
steps.body: This tells you where an order is in the process. 'Processing' means it's paid and waiting for you to ship it. 'Completed' means it's been fulfilled.

steps.title: Create a Manual Order
steps.body: Need to add an order for a phone sale or in-person purchase? Use this button to create one manually.
